codeReview.summary: The feature implementation matches the requested dashboard behavior: `/dashboard` renders greeting text for the authenticated user context, displays four distinct quick-action cards with lucide-react icons, and links each card to the correct route using shadcn/ui Card components.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `fullstack-worker` skill requires reading `.factory/library/architecture.md` and `.factory/library/environment.md`, but this worker transcript skeleton does not show those reads while `handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure` is still `true`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session 63e69ec3-340c-4d15-a2e7-360fef129a81 shows reads of mission files, services.yaml, README, and app files, but no reads of `.factory/library/architecture.md` or `.factory/library/environment.md`; handoff skillFeedback marks followedProcedure=true.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance and executable service commands are inconsistent on linting, which can cause worker confusion during validation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /root/.factory/missions/1417e725-972e-4dd0-a683-c2965f2f6b3f/AGENTS.md says to run `npx next lint`, while /root/try-fac/try-fac/.factory/services.yaml defines lint as `npx eslint .`.

summary: Reviewed the dashboard-page transcript skeleton and commit diff for 3fba459; implementation satisfies the feature requirements with no blocking correctness issues found. Logged two shared-state observations about skill procedure traceability and lint-command convention drift.
